/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhwinfo_network.so -o ../../libhwinfo_network.so CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/apple/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/linux/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/windows/network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/windows/utils/wmi_wrapper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/apple/utils/filesystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hwinfo_network.dir/linux/utils/filesystem.cpp.o
